name: Puffed Pizza Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground beef until brown and drain excess fat.
2. Stir in the tomato sauce, onions, green peppers, spaghetti sauce mix, oregano, garlic, and a dash of hot pepper sauce if desired. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
4. In a small bowl, beat together milk, melted butter or margarine, oil, and eggs for 1 minute.
5. Add the flour and continue beating for 2 more minutes.
6. Pour the meat mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish. Sprinkle with shredded mozzarella cheese.
7. Top with the batter. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for 30 minutes, or until puffed and golden brown. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
